options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -reset
options.description: Resets all or specified options to default value

options.name: -abutted
options.description: Assumes all partitions are abutted

options.name: -accumulated
options.description: Write both interface and flat constraints for nested partitions under if {budget_use_accumulated != 1} { } else { } conditions.

options.name: -boundaryConditionTemplatePath
options.description: Directory path containing model files to be used with option useBoundaryCondition template

options.name: -bufferDelayLibCell
options.description: user defined buffer which should be used for virtual buffer adjustment

options.name: -bufferDelaySelectionEffort
options.description: {low|high|none} controls the tool effort for calculating the buffer delay adjustment internally

options.name: -ccd
options.description: Generates scripts for verification of time budgeting top and block constraints against pre-budget chip constraints using the CCD

options.name: -constantModel
options.description: Specifies the type of timing model created

options.name: -distributeMMMC
options.description: Distribute multiple analysis views over multiple sessions

options.name: -dontWriteWireLoad
options.description: write set_load with -wire_load information

options.name: -driveConstraint
options.description: {drive|drive_cell|input_transition} Driving boundary constraint to be written on block input port

options.name: -fixTopLevelPaths
options.description: {none|all|negativeOnly|positiveOnly} Slack value for which the top-level timing budget is fixed, and remaining budget is proportioned only for partitions

options.name: -handleComplexSDC
options.description: handle sdc files with complex constructs and regular expressions in push down

options.name: -honorPortBoundaryCondition
options.description: {true|false} Push down chip IO constraints to block boundary pins which are directly connected to chip IO

options.name: -honorPortDelays
options.description: Push down chip IO SID SOD values to block IO if the two are directly connected and abutting.

options.name: -honorReportTimingFormat
options.description: honor set_global report_timing_format in justification reports

options.name: -ignoreDontTouch
options.description: Specifies the handling of don't touch objects

options.name: -includeLatency
options.description: Specifies whether the clock latency is included in the set_input_delay and set_output_delay constraints

options.name: -includeWireLoadsInLib
options.description: Include the wire loads in library model pin capacitance

options.name: -inputLoad
options.description: write set_load for input pins

options.name: -justify
options.description: {delay|exception|lib_arc|boundary_condition|all} controls the type of justification

options.name: -justifyBudgetDir
options.description: Alternate directory name for justify reports when -justify is given with deriveTimingBudget

options.name: -keepPinListsForBlockPorts
options.description: Preserve all fan-in and fan-out lists

options.name: -latencyOnClocks
options.description: write set_clock_latency on clocks

options.name: -localLatency
options.description: Write user specific set_clock_latency constraints, provided through setPtnUserCnsFile command, in partition constraint files

options.name: -localUncertainty
options.description: Use local uncertainty specified through setPtnUserCnsFile command for partitions

options.name: -makeNegativeInputDelayZero
options.description: {true|false} To be backward compatible where negative set input delays were made zero

options.name: -makeReducedTimingGraph
options.description: Enable running ART before Budgeting.

options.name: -masterClone
options.description: {masterOnly|merged|uniqueViewPerHInst} controls the tool behaviour for master clones

options.name: -noFalsePathsForUnCstrPorts
options.description: {true|false} do not create false paths for unconstrained ports

options.name: -noHoldView
options.description: Disable hold view budgeting

options.name: -noSetupView
options.description: Disable setup view budgeting

options.name: -reportOrModifyBudget
options.description: Enable the collection of data to use the reportBudget and modifyBudget commands

options.name: -rptNegSlackOnPorts
options.description: save warnings for ports having slack less than the specified value

options.name: -sdcContents
options.description: {full|||pushDownOnly|||boundaryConstraintsOnly|||noBoundaryCondition|||noBoundaryConstraints} option to control SDC contents

options.name: -stageBasedFanoutDrivingFactor
options.description: Fanout count of the pin, above which we will add buffer stages in Timing Graph

options.name: -stageBasedPartitionMultiplier
options.description: List of partition hinsts with its corresponding multiplication factor

options.name: -stageBasedWeight
options.description: List of weights given for {Sequential Combinational Buffer} cells

options.name: -useBoundaryCondition
options.description: {optimized|template|actual|empty} Mechanism used for finding buffers to be used as driver/load

options.name: -virtualClock
options.description: Create additional virtual clocks for budgeting

options.name: -virtualOptEngine
options.description: {none|earlyTimingEngine|proto} Specifies the virtual optimization engine to be used

options.name: -writeConstraintsForClkOutputPorts
options.description: {true|false} Write constraints for clock output ports

options.name: -writeFPForHold
options.description: write false path -hold for all I/Os in setup budgeting

options.name: -writeLatencyPerClock
options.description: write latency per clock instead of per port
